justification: All three ACs present with exact values ($47.80->47, $0.99->0, 12-month expiry). Both domain rules present (1pt/dollar floor-rounded, 12-month inactivity expiry). Both architecture functions referenced (earnPoints, checkExpiry) with implementation notes including Math.floor and date comparison. 365-day vs 12-month terminology conflict explicitly flagged and resolved in contradictions_resolved section. loyalty.ts file location mentioned. No invented information — open questions are clearly flagged as unresolved rather than fabricated answers.

observations.text: AC2 ($0.99 -> 0 points) explicitly preserved as a separate acceptance criterion testing the floor edge case
365-day vs 12-month conflict not only flagged but resolved with Bird as domain authority and a concrete example date
Original wording 'no purchase in 12 months' preserved in domain rules rather than replaced with vague 'inactive accounts'
Architecture guidance includes Math.floor specifically, loyalty.ts as target file, and both function signatures
Open questions are genuine gaps in the source specs (state management, storage representation) rather than invented context

Terminology alignment section flags domain-to-technical mappings but does not explicitly call out the 12-months vs 365-days discrepancy as a terminology alignment issue — it appears only in contradictions_resolved
